title: Assembly: Endgame
quote: "A high-stakes word-guessing survival game built with React 19. Players rescue iconic programming languages through dynamic state management and full ARIA accessibility."
challenges: Complex state orchestration for managing language lifecycles, attempts, and real-time win/loss conditions.
Ensuring universal accessibility (WCAG) in a dynamic game environment through precise ARIA live regions.
Visual and logical synchronization of an interactive keyboard with attempt history for seamless navigation.
solutions: Strategic use of 'aria-live' to notify screen readers of critical state changes and game outcomes.
Modular architecture based on specialized components (Status, LanguageChips, Keyboard) for clean rendering logic.
Implementation of dynamic visual feedback and celebration effects (react-confetti) to enhance user experience (UX).
imageAlt: A digital interface showing a word-guessing game with glowing programming language chips and a retro-futuristic terminal aesthetic
